title: Operations Leader - Aftermarkets (APAC & Middle East)
description:
Position Summary

The Service & Aftermarket Field Operations Leader is responsible for driving operational excellence, standardizing processes, and ensuring rigorous execution of critical KPIs across the region. This role will lead forecasting, KPI performance management, problem solving campaigns, and cross-functional initiatives to optimize service operations and deliver sustained growth in aftermarket services.

Key Responsibilities

Operational Standardization

  • Partner with field service teams to implement and drive standardization of processes and critical operational KPIs across all branches.
  • Ensure KPIs are measurable and manageable at each branch.

KPI Ownership & Performance Management

  • Own and manage Service KPIs, including:
  • Install base visibility
  • DLP conversion
  • Pipeline growth
  • Order conversion (SA/SR/SM/Parts)
  • Technician field lead/convert/quote
  • Utilization
  • Renewal margin expansion
  • Drive rigor on executing critical KPIs across AME.
  • Others as required

Forecasting & Gap Analysis

  • Develop and leverage forecasting models to improve accuracy and identify gaps 3–4 quarters ahead.
  • Use predictive insights to proactively address potential issues before they escalate.

Cross-Functional Problem Solving

  • Stand up, deep dive, and execute cross-functional campaigns to resolve problem areas.
  • Collaborate with IT and other functional teams on process improvement, automation and simplification for service operations.

Required Skills & Competencies

  • Strong leadership and ability to influence cross-functional teams.
  • Expertise in service operations and aftermarket processes.
  • Advanced analytical skills for KPI tracking and forecasting.
  • Experience in process improvement methodologies (Lean, Six Sigma preferred).
  • Excellent communication and stakeholder management skills.

Qualifications

  • Bachelor’s degree in business, Engineering, or related field.
  • 6+ years in service operations leadership roles.
  • Proven track record in driving operational standardization and KPI management.

Performance Metrics

  • Service revenue growth (SA, SR, Mods & Upgrades, Parts).
  • Utilization rate and productivity.
  • Forecast accuracy and proactive gap closure.
  • Customer satisfaction and renewal margin expansion.
  • Compliance with safety and operational standards.

postedCompany.description:
THE INVENTION THAT CHANGED THE WORLD 

In 1902, Willis Carrier solved one of mankind’s most elusive challenges by controlling the indoor environment through modern air conditioning. His invention enabled countless industries, promoting global productivity, health and personal comfort.

Today, Carrier innovations are found across the globe and in virtually every facet of daily life. We create comfortable and productive environments, regardless of the climate. We safeguard the global food supply by preserving the quality and freshness of food and beverages. We ensure health and well-being by enabling the proper transport and delivery of vital medical supplies under exacting conditions. We provide solutions, services and education to lead the green building movement.

These mark just a handful of the ways that Carrier works to make the world a better place to live, work and play.

NATURAL LEADERSHIP

From the very beginning, Carrier has been a natural leader. Not simply for the fact that we created an entirely new and innovative product, but because as we did so, we set the standard in environmental responsibility. Since 1994, we have led the industry in the phase-out of ozone-depleting refrigerants while introducing many of the world’s most energy-efficient heating, air-conditioning and refrigeration systems.

Preservation of the environment and protecting our world’s finite natural resources is a central tenet of our business. We recognize the vital importance of maintaining a responsible balance between the comfort we create today and the world we live in tomorrow.
postedCompany.name: CARRIER SINGAPORE (PTE) LIMITED
